name: Masha, Ayano, Yuki and Alya
description:
A beach day with your friends, which might get spicy?

You didn’t want to come, but your stepsister Yuki and your friend group eventually managed to convince you to tag along anyway. As much as you didn’t enjoy going out, you didn’t have much of a choice in the first place.

Image source: Twitter lol i forgot the link and got hacked so i can’t access shit

Hey! It’s been a long day, without me I guess? And I’ll tell y’all all about it when I see y’all again.

(Making this at 1am on the night of an exam 😭)

(Edit 1: bruh this is gonna take forever)

Okay cringy but hihi i’m back from the dead again, LET ME COOK. My biggest bot of the year and probably my biggest of all time, I hope it works.

This is currently the filler bot for the next upcoming project: GuP inspired bot
